title: Who is Ryan Pownall? Alissa Violet’s boyfriend as YouTuber’s arrest report reveals details of their relationship and reported fight
summary_full: Ryan Pownall is a Canadian entrepreneur and podcast host who recently made headlines after TMZ reported an alleged argument with Alissa Violet that led to her arrest. The couple dated for nine months and have now split. Violet, known for past relationships with Jake Paul and FaZe Banks, has not responded to the report so far.
